0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"From Mem0"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Import all memories from ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mem0.ai","children":"Mem0"}]," into Mnemosyne. Supports cloud-hosted Mem0 Platform, self-hosted Mem0 OSS, and offline export files."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"One Command"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"hermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"That's it. The importer handles pagination across all users, extracts every memory, and preserves identity metadata."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Gets Imported"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working memories"}],": Every memory object from Mem0"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"User/Agent identity"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]," → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]," (type: human), ",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent_id"}]," → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]," (type: agent)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"App scoping"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"app_id"}]," → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Metadata"}],": Original Mem0 fields (",["$","code",null,{"children":"_mem0_id"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"_mem0_hash"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"_mem0_run_id"}],") preserved in metadata"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Categories"}],": Mem0 category tags stored in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"_mem0_categories"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Timestamps"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]," preserved as ",["$","code",null,{"children":"imported_at_original"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Options"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Filter by specific user\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx --user-id alice\n\n# Filter by agent\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx --agent-id agent-123\n\n# Assign to a channel\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx --channel-id my-team\n\n# Self-hosted Mem0 OSS\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --base-url http://localhost:8000\n\n# Dry run (validate, no writes)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx --dry-run\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Extraction Methods"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The Mem0 importer tries three extraction methods in order:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python SDK"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mem0ai"}],") — Uses ",["$","code",null,{"children":"client.get_all()"}]," with pagination. Best coverage."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"REST API"}]," — Fetches all memories from the Mem0 HTTP API. Works for OSS self-hosted."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Structured Export"}]," — Uses Mem0 Platform's ",["$","code",null,{"children":"create_memory_export()"}]," for guided extraction."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"If no method works, the importer returns clear error messages telling you what to install or configure."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"SDK Dependencies"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Install the Mem0 SDK if you want the best extraction coverage:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install mem0ai\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Or let the importer fall back to REST. Both work."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Identity Mapping"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Mem0 Field"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne Field"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]," (","$L3",")"]}]]}],"$L4","$L5","$L6","$L7","$L8","$L9"]}]]}],"\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc"],["$Ld"],"$Le"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"zj_hjOJvNkOONB6cRNspF"}
3:["$","code",null,{"children":"mem0_user:{user_id}"}]
4:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"agent_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem0_agent:{agent_id}"}],")"]}]]}]
5:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"app_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}]}]]}]

8:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"categories"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Stored as ",["$","code",null,{"children":"_mem0_categories"}]]}]]}]
9:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"run_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Stored as ",["$","code",null,{"children":"_mem0_run_id"}]]}]]}]
a:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Import"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Use the Python SDK directly if you prefer:"}]
c:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\nfrom mnemosyne.core.importers import import_from_mem0\n\nmnemosyne = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"migration\")\n\nresult = import_from_mem0(\n    api_key=\"sk-xxx\",\n    mnemosyne=mnemosyne,\n    user_id=\"alice\",           # optional filter\n    dry_run=True,              # try True first\n)\n\nprint(f\"Imported {result.imported} of {result.total}\")\nprint(f\"Failed: {result.failed}\")\n"}]}]
d:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0a4uvox5u-8r1.js","async":true}]
